summary: Surah Ash-Shura emphasizes the divine origin of revelation, the unity and greatness of Allah, and the certainty of resurrection and judgment. It highlights the importance of mutual consultation, forgiveness, patience, and justice in society. The surah warns against division, arrogance, and reliance on worldly power, and teaches that all matters return to Allah, who alone controls mercy, punishment, and creation.
